meta.description: Twitch Crowd Control effects for KH1 Final Mix (Steam/EGS PC), via KH1-CROWDCONTROL + KH1-LUA-LIBRARY.

give_potion.description: Spawns a Potion pickup near Sora.

give_hi_potion.description: Spawns a Hi-Potion pickup near Sora.

give_ether.description: Spawns an Ether pickup near Sora.

give_elixir.description: Spawns an Elixir pickup near Sora.

give_mega_potion.description: Spawns a Mega-Potion pickup near Sora.

give_mega_ether.description: Spawns a Mega-Ether pickup near Sora.

give_megalixir.description: Spawns a Megalixir pickup near Sora.

give_tent.description: Spawns a Tent pickup near Sora.

give_camping_set.description: Spawns a Camping Set pickup near Sora.

give_cottage.description: Spawns a Cottage pickup near Sora.

give_power_up.description: Spawns a Power Up pickup near Sora.

give_defense_up.description: Spawns a Defense Up pickup near Sora.

give_ap_up.description: Spawns an AP Up pickup near Sora.

message.description: Shows a preset message in the item-pickup popup.

force_scan.description: Temporarily forces the Scan ability effect on, regardless of whether it's equipped.

force_combo_master.description: Temporarily forces Combo Master behavior on.

summon_anywhere.description: Temporarily allows summoning anywhere, regardless of the normal restriction.

midair_dodge_guard.description: Temporarily allows Dodge Roll and Guard to be used in midair.

air_items.description: Temporarily allows items to be used while airborne.

mega_combos.description: Temporarily raises Sora's ground and air combo limits to 10.

no_combos.description: Temporarily drops Sora's ground and air combo limits to 1 (no combo strings).

magic_boost.description: EXPERIMENTAL, not live-verified: temporarily boosts every spell's effectiveness by 50%.

magic_nerf.description: EXPERIMENTAL, not live-verified: temporarily halves every spell's effectiveness.

ability_aerial_sweep.description: Grants the Aerial Sweep ability effect.

ability_dodge_roll.description: Grants the Dodge Roll ability effect.

ability_sliding_dash.description: Grants the Sliding Dash ability effect.

ability_hurricane_blast.description: Grants the Hurricane Blast ability effect.

ability_ripple_drive.description: Grants the Ripple Drive ability effect.

ability_stun_impact.description: Grants the Stun Impact ability effect.

ability_gravity_break.description: Grants the Gravity Break ability effect.

ability_sonic_blade.description: Grants the Sonic Blade ability effect.

ability_ars_arcanum.description: Grants the Ars Arcanum ability effect.

ability_strike_raid.description: Grants the Strike Raid ability effect.

ability_trinity_limit.description: Grants the Trinity Limit ability effect.

ability_mp_haste.description: Grants the MP Haste ability effect.

ability_mp_rage.description: Grants the MP Rage ability effect.

ability_second_chance.description: Grants the Second Chance ability effect.

ability_leaf_bracer.description: Grants the Leaf Bracer ability effect.
